description_long: This house is a modern, multi-story residential building with a predominantly white facade and large, floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light. The structure features several balconies with black metal railings, a rooftop terrace, and a spacious outdoor area that includes a swimming pool and a circular hot tub. The design incorporates clean lines, flat roofs, and a mix of open and enclosed spaces, giving it a contemporary urban feel. The main entryway is recessed and framed by tall windows, while the rear of the house opens up to a large patio and pool area. The use of glass and metal elements contrasts with the solid white walls, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. The house appears to be constructed primarily from concrete, glass, and metal, with some landscaped areas visible.
description: A modern, multi-story white house with large glass windows, multiple balconies, a rooftop terrace, and outdoor pool and hot tub areas. The design features clean lines, flat roofs, and a minimalist aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, balconies with black railings, and a circular hot tub on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extensive glass facade, multiple stories, and the rooftop terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the swimming pool, large patio area, and several balconies overlooking the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the hot tub, additional balconies, and the layered structure of the house.
attribute_window_arrangement: large picture windows in asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with tall glass panels, steps leading up, and minimal decorative elements
